feature.label: Eclipse Themes
feature.description:
Transform your coding experience with a fresh look for your editor. This feature provides a curated collection of popular color themes that beautify your syntax highlighting, including favorites like Solarized, Catppuccin, and GitHub Dark.
Enjoy a more comfortable and visually appealing workspace within the Eclipse editor area, with support for multiple languages like Java, C++, and XML. (Note: This plugin styles the code editor, not the entire Eclipse IDE user interface.)
feature.copyright: Copyright (c) 2024 Ahmed Hatem. All rights reserved.
